expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_TOKEN or similar)
expectations.evidence: Uses NOTION_TOKEN and also lists related NOTION_DOCUMENT_INDEX_DB_ID and NOTION_PROPERTIES_DB_ID

expectations.text: Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
expectations.evidence: Shows 'source ~/.zshrc' to reload and provides the echo command to add the source line if missing

expectations.text: Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
expectations.evidence: States 'Keep all credentials in ecosystem.env - do not add them directly to .zshrc'

expectations.text: Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable
expectations.evidence: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env.example as the template for all available variables
